prefix_guidance.WEB: Website application work, normally implemented in the next repo: routes, React components, public pages, app APIs, auth/member UI, analytics wiring, and site infrastructure.
prefix_guidance.COACH: Shopify Growth Coaching product work: curriculum, member modules, checklists, coaching workflows, readiness flows, and product packaging.
prefix_guidance.EMAIL: Email repo or email-system work: transactional emails, newsletter infrastructure, Sendy/SES flows, templates, deliverability, and email assets.
prefix_guidance.ADS: Advertising and creative production work: product-ads, Meta/TikTok creative, acquisition ad packets, offer tests, and visual QA for paid media.
prefix_guidance.LEAD: Lead-magnet and report-style tool work: analyzers, calculators, signed reports, result pages, report emails, operator notifications, and conversion tracking.
prefix_guidance.CONTENT: Content and publishing work: guides, YouTube/video packages, transcripts, SEO/editorial updates, content packets, and repurposing.
prefix_guidance.OPS: Workspace operations and cross-repo coordination: project workflow, repo hygiene, integrations, data migrations, deployment/process tasks, and work that does not fit a product prefix.
prefix_guidance.TASK: Legacy/general fallback for existing migrated tasks. Prefer a more specific prefix for new work when possible.
